title: Teaching: scoped red-first runs, the small-lane parallel criterion, and the schema-first habit
action: Per cli-ergonomics D3 (decision 8ef2bae6) and plan.md ce-3. (1) Scoped red-first: bee-executing SKILL.md near :67 and worker-details.md red_failure_evidence section — the red run executes ONLY the tests this cell adds or changes (name the test file/filter); the full cell verify chain runs exactly once, at the end, before cap; full-suite red loops are the named waste. (2) Parallel criterion appended to the small-lane serial doctrine in BOTH bee-swarming/SKILL.md:24 and routing-and-contracts.md:275, keeping every existing sentence: serial stays the default; cells may run in parallel ONLY when every cell's file set INCLUDING regen targets (release manifest, onboarding ledger, plugin mirrors) is provably disjoint; any shared generated artifact forces serial; in doubt, serial. (3) AGENTS.block.md item 7: append the schema-first habit sentence — before the FIRST use of a bee command group in a session, load that group's schema (node .bee/bin/bee.mjs <group> --help --json): one roundtrip instead of a flag-error ladder — phrased as a recommended habit; the existing explicitly-deferred-mandate wording stays verbatim. NEVER hand-edit AGENTS.md. Regen in order: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply, node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write. Diff-check AGENTS.md picked up item 7's new sentence. Verify: test_misc.mjs (doc coverage) + grep for the three new clauses + manifest check.

truths: every existing doctrine sentence preserved verbatim (serial law, deferred-mandate wording, red-first law)
scoped-red clause present in bee-executing SKILL.md and worker-details.md
parallel criterion present in both bee-swarming SKILL.md and routing-and-contracts.md
schema-first habit present in AGENTS.block.md and rendered AGENTS.md
release manifest regenerated and check green

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs && grep -q 'provably disjoint' skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md && grep -q 'provably disjoint' skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md && grep -q 'help --json' AGENTS.md && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
